title: beri tahu saya context repo ini

messages.content: beri tahu saya context repo ini

Let me eksplorasi struktur repo untuk memberikan gambaran lengkap konteksnya.Sekarang saya punya konteks lengkap. Berikut ringkasan **Context Repo** untuk Anda:

---

## 📋 **Context Repo: PRD Analysis — Omnichannel SatuInbox**

### 🧭 Apa Itu Repo Ini?

Repo `PRDanalisis` adalah **workspace analisa PRD (Product Requirements Document)** untuk produk **Omnichannel SatuInbox** — platform *customer service live chat* dengan integrasi **WhatsApp**.

**Fungsi utama:**
1. **Analisa PRD** — sebelum fitur dikerjakan, PRD dianalisa kelayakannya
2. **QA Assessment** — menghasilkan decision: GO / NO_GO / REVISE_PRD
3. **Test Case Writing** — manual TSV + QA spec + automation mapping
4. **Automation Bridge** — output test → Playwright scripts di repo `sixV2Automation`
5. **Memory Persistence** — menyimpan canonical rules, deep-dive analysis, architecture reference

---

### 📁 **Struktur Folder**

| Folder | Fungsi | Isi Utama |
|--------|--------|-----------|
| **`PRD/`** | Dokumen PRD original | `Conversation/` (V1 deprecated), `Conversationv2/` (V2 source of truth), `ticketv2/` (V2 source of truth), `Whatsapp web v2/` (V2 source of truth), dll |
| **`Memory/`** | Context kerja persisten | `global-memory.md`, `CLAUDE-be.md`, `CLAUDE-fe.md`, cross-analysis files, comparison V1 vs V2 |
| **`Assessments/`** | Hasil analisa permanen | Decision-bearing reports per domain + `templates/qa-assessment-report-template.md` |
| **`Test/`** | Artefak testing | TSV manual, QA test spec, automation mapping — per domain (conversation, ticket, whatsapp-web) |
| **`Rules/`** | Framework aturan kerja | `agent-instruction.md` (entry point), `workflow-rule.md`, `qa-analysis-rule.md`, `test-case-rule.md`, dll (14 file) |
| **`AgentNotes/`** | Catatan agent | Saat ini kosong |

---

### 🎯 **Domain Utama & Status Implementasi**

| Domain | V2 Source of Truth | V1 Status | FE V2 Implementation | BE V2 Implementation |
|--------|-------------------|-----------|---------------------|---------------------|
| **Conversation** | `PRD/Conversationv2/` (13 file) | Deprecated | ~85% | ~85% |
| **Ticket** | `PRD/ticketv2/` | Deprecated | ~95% | ~95% |
| **WhatsApp Web** | `PRD/Whatsapp web v2/` | Deprecated | ~70% | ~70% |

---

### 🔑 **Insight Kunci dari Memory**

1. **3-way conflict unresolved:** Hold vs Snooze vs SLA pause — beda definisi di berbagai PRD V2
2. **Reopen behavior** belum final (3 definisi berbeda dari 3 file V2)
3. **SLA color threshold mismatch:** FE pakai absolute time, V2 pakai percentage
4. **15 fitur undeveloped** tersebar di 3 domain — FE dan BE sama-sama belum implement
5. **Linked Chat Bubble Patch** sudah dianalisa impact-nya untuk Ticketing

---

### 🔗 **Hubungan ke Repo Lain**

| Repo | Lokasi | Hubungan dengan Repo Ini |
|------|--------|-------------------------|
| **sixV2Automation** | `C:\Users\MyBook SAGA 12\Desktop\sixV2Automation` | Target automation — Playwright E2E specs yang digenerate dari TSV di repo ini |
| **omnichannel-satuinbox-fe** | `C:\Users\MyBook SAGA 12\Desktop\FE satuinbox\omnichannel-satuinbox-fe` | FE reference — component tree, selectors, API services, state management |

---

### ⚙️ **Alur Kerja Utama (Workflow)**

```
BRD → PRD V2 Writing → QA Assessment (Decision: GO/NO_GO/REVISE_PRD)
                                    ↓
                          Test Case Writing (TSV + QA Spec + Automation Mapping)
                                    ↓
                          Automation Script Generation (Playwright → sixV2Automation)
                                    ↓
                          Execution & Maintenance
```

---

### 📄 **File yang Sedang Aktif: WhatsApp Web Outbound Anti-Ban Guard**

| File | Status |
|------|--------|
| `PRD/Whatsapp web v2/PRD WA Web Outbound Anti-Ban Guard.md` | PRD V2 — sedang dianalisa |
| `Assessments/whatsapp-web/wa-outbound-anti-ban-guard/wa-outbound-anti-ban-guard-qa-assessment.md` | ✅ Final — Decision: `REVISE_PRD` (NO_GO) |
| `Assessments/whatsapp-web/wa-outbound-anti-ban-guard/wa-outbound-anti-ban-final-gap-review.md` | ✅ Gap review |
| `Assessments/whatsapp-web/wa-outbound-anti-ban-guard/wa-outbound-anti-ban-repo-impact-and-estimation.md` | ✅ Impact & estimation |
| `Test/whatsapp-web/WhatsApp Web Outbound Anti-Ban Guard.tsv` | ✅ Manual test case |
| `Test/whatsapp-web/wa-outbound-anti-ban-qa-test-spec.md` | ✅ QA test spec |
| `Test/whatsapp-web/wa-outbound-anti-ban-automation-mapping.md` | ✅ Automation mapping |

**Status:** PRD ini **belum siap develop** — ada **7 open blocker** yang perlu dijawab oleh Product Owner sebelum bisa lanjut ke tahap development.

---

Ada yang ingin ditanyakan lebih lanjut tentang repo ini atau fitur spesifik?
